infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Velocity needs access to your photos to upload driver verification documents.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Velocity needs camera access to capture verification documents.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Velocity uses your location to match nearby rides and enable live trip tracking.
